name: Sheriff's Badge
description: A unique Eridian relic built for pistol users, boosting pistol fire rate and damage while also extending Fight For Your Life time. In co-op, it becomes even better thanks to party bonuses tied to allies wearing Deputy's Badges.
notes:
It is the stronger counterpart to Deputy's Badge, trading shotgun bonuses for pistol boosts while adding more survivability.

It is usually most effective when only one player equips it, because the extra party bonuses come from teammates wearing Deputy's Badges rather than from stacking multiple Sheriff's Badges. Its pistol bonuses also apply to Krieg's thrown buzz axe.

It is also the only purple-rarity relic with red flavor text.

special.description: Boosts pistol fire rate and damage, and increases Fight For Your Life bleed-out time. For each Deputy's Badge equipped by another player, everyone on the team also gains bonus maximum health and extra Fight For Your Life time.
special.title: Take turns and play nice.

abilities: Increases Fight for Your Life Time and Max Health by 15y. for every
